howItWorks.intro: This loan payment calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

faq.q: How do I lower my payment?
faq.a: Longer term, lower rate, or smaller loan amount.
Fixed stays the same. Variable can change, usually starting lower.

howWeCalculate.intro: This loan payment calculator uses established formulas and current data to provide accurate estimates.
steps: Enter your specific values into the calculator fields above
Our algorithm applies the relevant formulas using your inputs
